RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT JILL ENQUIST's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment -- Granted. 5 days leave to answer or otherwise respond. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
